note: Authoritative catalog of shared modules. The standard (STD-ENG-008) defines RULES for reusable modules; this file is DATA and may be updated without a standard version bump provided governance records the change in modules/CHANGELOG.md.

modules.name: Identity Module
modules.key_components: User registration, email verification, password hashing (Argon2id), account lockout, MFA (TOTP/WebAuthn)

modules.name: Authentication Module
modules.key_components: Login/logout, session management, OAuth 2.0/OIDC, SAML SSO, magic links, token refresh

modules.name: Authorization Module
modules.key_components: RBAC engine, permission evaluation, policy enforcement, ACL management, tenant isolation

modules.name: API Gateway Module
modules.key_components: Rate limiting, request validation, response envelopes, versioning, error handling

modules.name: Identifier Module
modules.key_components: CC-PID generation, check digit validation, entity code registry

modules.name: Configuration Module
modules.key_components: Config sources (env/file/remote), schema validation, defaults, per-environment overrides, env var loading

modules.name: Error Handling Module
modules.key_components: Error taxonomy, standard error classes, error serialization, i18n-ready messages, implements ICD-5

modules.name: Core Utilities Module
modules.key_components: Date/time (ISO 8601 UTC, timezone), string ops (slugify, truncate, PII-safe), math (currency, precision)

modules.name: Localization Module
modules.key_components: Translation management, locale detection, number/date/currency formatting, pluralization, RTL support, i18n key registry

modules.name: Cache Module
modules.key_components: Cache-aside/write-through/write-behind, Redis/Memcached abstraction, TTL management, tenant-scoped keys, invalidation, stampede protection

modules.name: Data Classification Module
modules.key_components: Classification labels (PUBLIC/INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED), handling rules, encryption triggers

modules.name: Soft-Delete Module
modules.key_components: Lifecycle states (ACTIVE→DELETED→PURGED), grace periods, cascade delete, restore API

modules.name: Records Management Module
modules.key_components: Retention policies, legal holds, archive management, disposal workflows

modules.name: Audit Log Module
modules.key_components: Immutable event logging, who/what/when/where capture, tamper detection

modules.name: Multi-Tenancy Module
modules.key_components: Tenant context, row-level security, cross-tenant query prevention

modules.name: Data Access Module
modules.key_components: Repository base, query builder (filter/sort/page), unit of work, transactions, connection pooling, migrations

modules.name: Search Module
modules.key_components: Full-text search abstraction (Elasticsearch/Typesense), indexing pipeline, faceted search, relevance tuning, tenant-scoped indices

modules.name: Logging Module
modules.key_components: Structured logging, log levels, PII redaction, correlation IDs

modules.name: Metrics Module
modules.key_components: Golden signals (latency/traffic/errors/saturation), histograms, counters

modules.name: Tracing Module
modules.key_components: Distributed tracing, span context, OpenTelemetry integration

modules.name: Alerting Module
modules.key_components: Threshold alerts, anomaly detection, severity routing, runbook links

modules.name: Health Check Module
modules.key_components: Liveness/readiness probes, dependency checks, status endpoints

modules.name: Cryptography Module
modules.key_components: Key generation, encryption/decryption, key rotation, envelope encryption

modules.name: Secret Management Module
modules.key_components: Secret storage, access control, rotation, injection

modules.name: Input Validation Module
modules.key_components: Schema validation, sanitization, injection prevention

modules.name: Rate Limiting Module
modules.key_components: Request throttling, quota management, backoff headers

modules.name: Security Headers Module
modules.key_components: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CORS configuration

modules.name: Webhook Module
modules.key_components: Event dispatch, retry logic, signature verification, delivery tracking

modules.name: Notification Module
modules.key_components: Multi-channel delivery (email/SMS/push), templates, preferences

modules.name: Email Module
modules.key_components: Transactional emails, templates, delivery tracking, bounce handling

modules.name: File Upload Module
modules.key_components: Presigned URLs, virus scanning, size limits, type validation

modules.name: HTTP Client Module
modules.key_components: Outbound HTTP, retry/backoff, circuit breaker, correlation propagation, mTLS, PII-redacted logging

modules.name: Message Bus Module
modules.key_components: Broker-agnostic pub/sub, dead-letter queues, consumer groups, schema validation, at-least-once delivery, backpressure

modules.name: Incident Management Module
modules.key_components: Incident declaration, severity classification, escalation, postmortem

modules.name: Change Management Module
modules.key_components: Change requests, approval workflows, rollback procedures

modules.name: Feature Flag Module
modules.key_components: Flag management, gradual rollout, A/B testing, kill switches

modules.name: Backup Module
modules.key_components: Automated backups, retention, restore testing, verification

modules.name: Billing Module
modules.key_components: Payment gateway abstraction, subscription lifecycle, plan management, usage metering, invoicing, proration, dunning, refunds, payment method vault

modules.name: Workflow Module
modules.key_components: State machine definition & execution, task assignment, approval chains, SLA tracking, escalation, parallel/sequential steps, compensation (rollback)

modules.name: UI Foundation Module
modules.key_components: Design tokens (color/spacing/typography/elevation/motion), theme engine (light/dark/white-label), component library (CYBERCUBE primitives), layout system (responsive grid/page templates/shell), WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
